# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
kbo_fixed_military_camps = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = KBO
	}
	
	requires = artillery_institution_advance
	
	land_unit_attrition = -0.1
	regiment_reinforcement_speed = 0.1
}

kbo_permanent_sieges = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	icon = mandinka_warrior_spirit
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = KBO
	}
	
	requires = artillery_institution_advance
	
	siege_ability = 0.1
	movement_speed_if_no_road = 0.05
}

	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = KBO  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla


	requires = unlock_arquebusiers_advance
}

	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = KBO

	requires = renaissance_thought
